titleStmt.title: SII 9.338: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 338. (A.R. No. 320 of 1925.) ON A STONE PLANTED IN FRONT OF THE MURUKAL-MATHA AT KOTTUR, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Vishu, Āshāḍha, ba. 5, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1221, July 11, Sunday. Hence the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Narasiṁha to whose reign the record belongs may be the second of that name. His general, Kēśava-Daṇḍanāyaka, who is stated here to have been the cause of the expansion of his kingdom, made a gift of the village Māvinamāge to Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa, Bhēruṇḍana-Bammayya, Achyuta-Bhaṭṭa and to Nāga, (son) of Chīlaya-Nāyaka for the purpose of maintaining a satra (feeding house) and appointed the Mummuridaṇḍas, Hariga Kāḷa-Bōva, Jagaddaḷa-Bammadēva's son Sōyidēva and Ghaṭṭidēva for the protection of the charity. Sēnābōva Sōmayya wrote this and the mason, Aṇṇōja engraved it. We know from other records that Kēśava was a Brāhman general. It also records a grant of land to the god Uḍakēśvaradēva by the Mantri Muktidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśaṁkaranārāyaṇāyanamaḥ . jīyaṁ kīrttipriyanō
beṁbaṁ kēśavamaṁtripuṁgavaṁ kūrttittaṁ śaṁkaranārāya
ṇaneṁbaṁkada bhaṭṭaṁge saṁda māvinamāgeyaṁ . sōmaṁ suvikramapāḷaraṇō
vade koṁdikki beṁbeyaṁ kēśavanu bhūvinutarosedu koṭṭaru māvinamā
geyaṁba haḷḷiyaṁ jagavaṟiyalurviyadhipati narasiṁhvana rājya
doḷī koṭṭūra haḷḷi māvinamāgeyaṁ mudadiṁ jagadoḷ sōyi
ya puditōditamāgi koṭṭarācandrārkkaṁ . svasti samastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanumahārājādhirājan pratāpacakravartti malerā
jarāja malaparoḷu gaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa yādavakuḷadvimaṇi sadrājacūḍā
maṇi hōśaṇavīranārasiṁhadēvarājyābhyudayakaraṇakāraṇa bhujabaḷa
bhīma parabaḷasādhaka beṁbidēva kēśavadaṁḍādhipaṁ kādi geludaṁ viṣusaṁvatsa
radayāśāḍa bahuḷa 5 yādivāradaṁdu rāyabhaṭṭa śaṁkaranārāyaṇa
neṁba bhaṭṭaṁge bhēruṁḍana baṁmayaneṁba bhaṭṭaṁge yacyutaneṁba bhaṭṭaṁge cīlaya
nāyakana nāgaṁge māvinamāgeyeṁba haḷḷiyaṁ koṭṭa satrakke yera
ḍu haṁneraḍaṟa prabhugaḷu muṁmuridaṁḍa paṭṭaṇasvāmigaḷu haṭṭa
gāṟa hariga kāḷabōva maṁḍaḷika jagaddaḷa baṁmidēvana suputra
sōyidēva ghaṭṭidēva yī dharmmavaṁ svadharmadiṁ pratipāḷisidaru yī dharmmakke yā
vanānu kaṁṭakanādavaṁge gaṁgātīradalli sāyira brāhma
ṇaruvaṁ sāyira kavuleya koṁdaṁtaha naraka Ī dharmmavaṁ yārayi
du rakṣisidavaṁge yā brāhmaṇiriṁge yā gaṁgātīradalliyā kavulegaḷaṁ ko
ṭṭa phala yī sāsanavaṁ yayyāvaḷaya sēnabōva sōmayya yī sāsana
paṁ khaṁḍaḷisidāta kalukuṭiga Aṇnōja maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī ©
śrīmatuḍakēśvaradēvarige maṁtri mūrttidēvaru tāvu haḍada keyiṁ holagēri
ya paḍovalu mattaru 4 beṁbēśvarada gadeyiṁda dēvara baḍagaṇa gade 270 kāni
dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭaru Ā dēvara tapōdhana baicajīya Ātana taṁma malla
jīya taṁma sakalasāmyadoḷage tamage Eraḍu bhāge mantramūrttigaḷigevera
ḍaṁ bhāgiyaṁ koṭṭaru . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.338 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
